description: Comprehensive AEC/FM filter library for the StingTools Drawing Template Manager. Defines ParameterFilterElement rules + matching OverrideGraphicSettings recipes per BS 1192 / ISO 19650 / Uniclass 2015 / BS 1710 / ASME A13.1 / GSA MEP / CIBSE-SDE / BS 8300 / BIM Forum LOD. Each entry is a self-describing POCO consumed by AecFilterRegistry + AecFilterFactory. Rule grammar: leaf rule = { param, kind?, op, value, type? } where kind=builtin|shared|phase|workset|level (default builtin); compound rule = { logic, rules[] } where logic=and|or. Op vocabulary: equals|notEquals|greater|greaterOrEqual|less|lessOrEqual|contains|notContains|beginsWith|notBeginsWith|endsWith|notEndsWith|hasValue|hasNoValue. Override fields mirror StyleFilterRule (extended Phase 139): visible/halftone/projColor/projWeight/projLinePattern/cutColor/cutWeight/cutLinePattern/surfFgColor/surfFgPattern/surfBgColor/surfBgPattern/transparency/detailLevel.

colorSchemes.GSA: US public sector BIM Technical Standards MEP color mapping
colorSchemes.CIBSE-SDE: CIBSE Society of Digital Engineering standard symbols (UK MEP)
colorSchemes.ISO19650: Status code colour conventions — BS EN ISO 19650-2 NA

filters.name: STING - Phase: Existing
filters.notes: Existing-to-remain — halftone grey across all model categories.

filters.name: STING - Phase: Future
filters.notes: Future work / planned expansion — blue dash-dot-dot, halftone, 40% transparent.

filters.name: STING - Status: S0 (Initial / WIP)
filters.notes: S0 = WIP / not yet shared. Halftone red watermark.

filters.name: STING - Status: S1 (Coordination)
filters.notes: S1 = suitable for coordination. Halftone amber.

filters.name: STING - Status: S3 (Review and comment)
filters.notes: S3 = suitable for review and comment.

filters.name: STING - Status: S7 (AIM authorisation)
filters.notes: S7 = suitable for AIM authorisation (handover to FM).

filters.name: STING - Arch: Fire 30 min Walls
filters.notes: 30-min fire compartment wall — pink wash + red cut.

filters.name: STING - Arch: Fire 120 min Walls
filters.notes: 120-min fire compartment wall — heaviest cut weight.

filters.name: STING - Arch: Acoustic Walls
filters.notes: Acoustic-rated wall (Rw value present in Type Comments) — blue crosshatch.

filters.name: STING - Arch: Load-Bearing Walls
filters.notes: Wall flagged structural — heavy cut + concrete hatch.

filters.name: STING - Arch: Partition Walls
filters.notes: Interior non-structural partition — thin black cut.

filters.name: STING - Arch: Cavity Walls
filters.notes: Cavity wall (twin-leaf masonry) — light grey crosshatch.

filters.name: STING - Arch: Accessible Doors (Part M)
filters.notes: Part M / BS 8300 accessible door — green.

filters.name: STING - Arch: Sliding / Folding Doors
filters.notes: Sliding / folding / pocket doors — dashed dark blue.

filters.name: STING - Arch: Fire-Rated Glazing
filters.notes: Any window with fire rating set.

filters.name: STING - Arch: Low U-Value Glazing (≤1.4)
filters.notes: High-performance glazing meeting Part L 2021 (U ≤ 1.4 W/m²K).

filters.name: STING - Arch: Curtain Panels
filters.notes: All curtain wall panels — translucent envelope.

filters.name: STING - Arch: Suspended Ceilings (MF)
filters.notes: Suspended ceiling (MF / metal frame) — fine grid.

filters.name: STING - Arch: Flat Roof
filters.notes: Flat roof / warm or inverted deck — heavy cut, dark grey wash.

filters.name: STING - Arch: Accessible WC Rooms
filters.notes: Accessible WC room (Part M) — green wash.

filters.name: STING - Arch: Escape / Refuge Rooms
filters.notes: Refuge / escape stair lobby — yellow wash.

filters.name: STING - Struct: Pile Caps
filters.notes: Pile cap — heavy cut, darker grey.

filters.name: STING - Struct: Piles
filters.notes: Piles below pile caps — dashed grey.

filters.name: STING - HVAC: LTHW Flow
filters.notes: Low-temp hot water flow — bright red.

filters.name: STING - Plumb: Domestic Hot Water Supply (DHWS)
filters.notes: Domestic Hot Water Supply — GSA red (255,60,60).

filters.name: STING - Plumb: Drinking Water
filters.notes: Drinking / potable water — green per BS 1710.

filters.name: STING - Plumb: Foul Below-Ground
filters.notes: Below-ground foul (BS EN 752) — heavy halftone brown.

filters.name: STING - Plumb: Vent Stacks
filters.notes: Vent stacks / stub stacks — orange dashed.

filters.name: STING - Plumb: Natural Gas
filters.notes: Natural gas — yellow ochre per BS 1710.

filters.name: STING - Elec: Emergency Lighting
filters.notes: Emergency lighting / exit signs — green, heavy.

filters.name: STING - Elec: Access Control
filters.notes: Card / fob access readers and door controllers.

filters.name: STING - Elec: Data / Telecoms
filters.notes: Data / telecoms outlets and patch points.

filters.name: STING - Elec: Lightning Protection
filters.notes: Lightning protection system per BS EN 62305.

filters.name: STING - Elec: Earthing & Bonding
filters.notes: Earthing electrodes, bonding conductors per BS 7671.

filters.name: STING - Fire: Compartment Walls
filters.notes: Fire compartment wall — solid red, weight 8.

filters.name: STING - Fire: Primary Escape Route
filters.notes: Primary escape route — bright green wash.

filters.name: STING - Fire: Secondary Escape Route
filters.notes: Secondary escape route — light green wash.

filters.name: STING - Coord: Clash - High Priority
filters.notes: High-priority hard clash flagged from Navisworks / Solibri import.

filters.name: STING - Coord: LOD < 300
filters.notes: Low LOD content (≤200) — halftone for stage gate views.

filters.name: STING - Coord: Workset - Architecture
filters.notes: Architecture workset — halftone in coordination views.

filters.name: STING - FM: COBie Equipment Type
filters.notes: Element with COBie Type assignment — flagged for handover.

filters.name: STING - FM: Critical Assets
filters.notes: Critical-rated asset (loss of service = life safety / business continuity issue).

filters.name: STING - FM: Warranty Active
filters.notes: Asset with active manufacturer / installer warranty.

filters.name: STING - QA: Untagged Elements
filters.notes: Elements without ISO 19650 tag — QA flag.

filters.name: STING - QA: Stale Elements
filters.notes: Element flagged stale (geometry changed since last tag).

filters.name: STING - Struct: Rebar Grade H (Hot-Rolled)
filters.notes: Grade H reinforcement — hot-rolled per BS 4449.

filters.name: STING - Class: Uniclass Wall Systems (Ss_25)
filters.notes: Uniclass 2015 Systems table — wall systems group.
